ENKR · Pang Jing Hui

Full-stack engineer and four-time beatbox champion in Singapore. This portfolio is a 3D fly-through of what I do and what I’ve shipped. Hiring, or have something to build? Let’s talk.

I’m Jing Hui, also known as ENKR: a full-stack engineer, a four-time beatbox champion in Singapore, and a lifter. The same thing runs through all three: find the rhythm, then do the reps. By day I’m an engineer at an early-stage startup; on my own time I build and ship products end to end, currently Gym Buddy, while studying Computer Science at NUS. Open to new roles, and happy to build the next product for a founder or team.

If you really try your best, you would never fail. Everything is rented. You can’t start slipping.

Selected work

  • Gym Buddy: a workout-tracking PWA with an exercise library, form-check tools, and full progress history.
  • Journal & Blog: weekly writing with progress tracking, on a custom Hugo theme I built and maintain.
  • 555 Beatbox: home for Singapore’s beatbox scene, built for the community I came up in.

Contact
